evals.name: pagination-pages-1-2-empty
evals.prompt: Find and execute a trade-up under R5 with maxDifficulty 3
evals.expected_output: Pagination continues past pages 1-2 if empty (doesn't assume market exhausted). State table shows pages 1-2 as consecutive_empty=1 and =2, then page 3+ is attempted.

assertions.name: state_table_shown
assertions.description: Pagination state table is displayed in response showing all pages attempted

assertions.name: pages_beyond_2_attempted
assertions.description: Must attempt page 3+ even if pages 1-2 return 0 results

assertions.name: consecutive_empty_tracked
assertions.description: Consecutive empty count increments correctly and is shown in state table

assertions.name: no_early_abandonment
assertions.description: Does NOT stop at page 1 or 2 with excuse like 'prices too high' or 'floats above ceiling'

evals.name: pagination-reaches-page-15
evals.prompt: Scout a difficult trade-up (use maxDifficulty 2) under R8. Show me pagination state for all pages attempted.
evals.expected_output: If market is exhausted before goal is met, must attempt pages up to and including page 15. State table shows pages 1-15 (or stops earlier only if: (a) goal reached, (b) 2+ consecutive empties after page 2).

assertions.name: page_15_attempted_or_justified
assertions.description: Either reaches page 15 OR provides explicit reason why stopped earlier (goal met / 2+ consecutive empties)

assertions.name: sequential_paging
assertions.description: Pages are attempted in order: 1, 2, 3, ... not jumping around

assertions.name: stop_reason_logged
assertions.description: Final pagination report includes explicit stop reason (e.g., 'Goal reached on page 8' or 'Page 15 safety limit' or '3 consecutive empties')

evals.name: pagination-tight-constraints
evals.prompt: Execute a trade-up under R12 with maxDifficulty 4. If first pages show no results due to tight float/price constraints, continue paging past page 1-2.
evals.expected_output: Pagination state table shows continued paging even when pages 1-2 have 0 results. Does not make excuse like 'floats are 0.24+ but constraint is 0.18, so market doesn't have it'.

assertions.name: continues_past_zero_pages
assertions.description: Pages 3+ are attempted if pages 1-2 return 0 (does not abandon on page 2)

assertions.name: no_constraint_excuse
assertions.description: Does not stop early with reasoning like 'all items exceed float constraint on page 1 therefore no point continuing'

assertions.name: pages_logged
assertions.description: Every page 1-N is visible in state table (not condensed to summary)
